queries.title: Queries
queries.description: Search queries (e.g. 'best invoicing app for freelancers').

engine.title: Search engine
engine.description: duckduckgo = reliable, no proxy needed. google = needs residential proxy, may be blocked.

maxResults.title: Max results per query
maxResults.description: Maximum organic results to return per query.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy (residential)
useProxy.description: Required for Google; recommended at volume. Uses residential credit.
